positive: A stylized, minimalist design of a whimsical forest creature—a blend of fox, owl, and crystalline elements. The creature is centrally composed, standing in a dramatic pose, looking upwards. It is surrounded by glowing bioluminescent foliage and abstract geometric woodland patterns that wrap around the subject. The style is neo-tribal mixed with Art Nouveau watercolor, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast. Use a limited color palette of deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and gold metallic accents against a crisp, off-white background. Overhead cinematic lighting highlights the creature's contours. Vector art quality, suitable for single-color printing or apparel transfer.
